name: motion-creative-bootcamp
description: Will Sartorious's Motion Creative Strategy Bootcamp Week 4 — 5-step AI ad creation system for DTC brands. Brand research, spec cards, copy scoring (7 agents, 90+ required), and competitor ad reverse-engineering. Outputs complete fal.ai Nano Banana 2 image prompts.
author: Will Sartorious (Motion Creative Strategy Bootcamp)

skills.name: brand-research
skills.description: Run once per brand. 7-phase brand intelligence brief (identity, product, proof, pain points, competitors, founder story, hooks) + Brand Spec Card and Visual Style Card as HTML pages ready to screenshot for fal.ai.

skills.name: ad-brief
skills.description: Generate a complete ad creative brief. Write copy for any of 15 DTC ad formats, score it through 7 agents (minimum 90+, Agent 7 has veto power), iterate until approved, output a complete fal.ai Nano Banana 2 image prompt.

skills.name: ad-swipe
skills.description: Clone any competitor ad without copying it. 3-stage workflow: deconstruct every creative decision from an uploaded competitor ad image, rebuild the structure for your brand with original copy, output a complete Nano Banana 2 prompt ready to paste into fal.ai.
